name: Tudor Inn (CBD)
description: Tudor Inn is a warm and inviting Italian restaurant located in the heart of the CBD. It features a cozy and rustic interior with an emphasis on comfort dining. Guests can enjoy traditional Italian dishes made from fresh ingredients. It is ideal for casual dinners and small group gatherings, offering a relaxed yet refined experience in a central location.

name: The Lion (Richmond)
image_text: [3] Givisas, “Dublin Pub Ireland - Free photo on Pixabay,” Pixabay.com, Dec. 03, 2018.
description: The Lion is a vibrant restaurant in Richmond known for generous portions and a friendly atmosphere. It offers hearty pub-style meals designed for sharing or individual dining. It is a popular venue for group outings and casual dinners, delivering a lively and enjoyable dining experience with attentive service.

name: The Yarra Hotel (South Yarra)
image_text: [4] Michelle-Maria, 'Restaurant Bar Pub - Free photo on Pixabay,' Pixabay.com, Sep. 24, 2024.
description: The Yarra Hotel offers an elegant dining experience in South Yarra with a focus on premium seafood and modern Australian cuisine. It combines refined presentation with high-quality local ingredients. It is ideal for special occasions and romantic dinners, offering a polished and upscale atmosphere.

name: Union Cove (Hawthorn)
image_text: [5] StillWZ, 'Canton Pub Sunset - Free photo on Pixabay,' Pixabay.com, Jun. 12, 2017.
description: Union Cove is a relaxed dining venue in Hawthorn offering a diverse menu combining local and international dishes. It is suitable for both casual meals and group events. The restaurant provides a flexible and welcoming environment for a wide range of dining occasions.

name: Royal Oak (St Kilda)
description: Royal Oak is a casual dining spot in St Kilda known for its relaxed atmosphere and affordable menu. It offers a wide selection of comfort food dishes, making it ideal for casual meals with friends or family near the beachside area.

name: Carlton Beer Garden (Carlton)
image_text: [7] Michael Schueller, 'England Pub Small - Free photo on Pixabay,' Pixabay.com, Sep. 2017.
description: Carlton Beer Garden is a lively outdoor venue in Carlton known for its social atmosphere and spacious beer garden. It offers pub-style meals and drinks, making it ideal for group gatherings, casual nights out, and relaxed social events.
